title: Local-first CRDT database for mobile apps
description: A database engine that uses CRDTs for conflict-free replication between devices, enabling fully offline-capable mobile applications without a central server.

title: AI-powered code review bot
description: A GitHub bot that uses LLMs to review pull requests, suggest improvements, and detect potential bugs before human review. Integrates with existing CI/CD pipelines.

title: WebAssembly runtime for edge computing
description: A lightweight WASM runtime designed for edge nodes, enabling serverless functions with sub-millisecond cold starts and strong sandboxing guarantees.

title: Peer-to-peer video conferencing without servers
description: End-to-end encrypted video calls using WebRTC with a mesh topology. No central server needed — participants connect directly to each other.

title: Personal knowledge graph from browser history
description: Automatically builds a knowledge graph from your browsing history, extracting entities and relationships to help you rediscover forgotten connections between topics.

title: Tiny ML framework for microcontrollers
description: Run neural network inference on Arduino and ESP32 boards. Supports quantized models under 100KB with automatic model compression from PyTorch.

title: Open-source Figma alternative with real-time collaboration
description: A self-hostable design tool with real-time multiplayer editing, vector graphics, and component libraries. Uses CRDTs for conflict resolution.

title: Automated database migration testing
description: Tool that spins up temporary database instances, applies migrations, seeds data, and runs integration tests to catch migration issues before production deployment.

title: Privacy-preserving analytics with differential privacy
description: A drop-in replacement for Google Analytics that adds calibrated noise to metrics using differential privacy, making it mathematically impossible to identify individuals.

title: Declarative infrastructure for AI training clusters
description: Define GPU clusters, networking, and storage for ML training jobs in YAML. Handles spot instance management, checkpointing, and automatic failover.

title: Git-based CMS for static sites
description: Content management system that stores everything in git. Editors use a web UI that commits directly to the repo, triggering static site rebuilds automatically.

title: Rust rewrite of core Unix utilities
description: Modern implementations of ls, cat, grep, find and other Unix tools in Rust. Faster performance, better error messages, and sane defaults while maintaining compatibility.

title: Decentralized identity verification
description: A protocol for verifiable credentials using DIDs (Decentralized Identifiers). Users control their own identity data without relying on centralized providers.

title: Browser extension for real-time language translation
description: Translates web pages in real-time using a local LLM running in WebGPU. No data sent to servers — all processing happens in the browser.

title: Semantic search engine for internal documentation
description: Index Confluence, Notion, Google Docs and Slack into a unified semantic search. Uses embeddings to find relevant docs even when exact keywords don't match.

title: Low-code workflow automation for non-technical teams
description: Visual builder for business automations connecting SaaS tools. Includes conditional logic, error handling, and approval workflows without writing code.

title: Collaborative Jupyter notebook alternative
description: A notebook environment with real-time collaboration, built-in version control, and reactive cells that automatically re-execute when dependencies change.

title: Supply chain attack detection for npm packages
description: Static and dynamic analysis of npm packages to detect supply chain attacks: typosquatting, malicious postinstall scripts, and compromised maintainer accounts.

title: Mesh VPN for connecting home lab devices
description: WireGuard-based mesh network that connects devices across NATs and firewalls. Auto-discovers peers and establishes direct connections when possible.

title: AI agent framework for autonomous coding
description: A framework for building AI agents that can read codebases, plan changes, write code, run tests, and iterate. Supports multiple LLM backends and tool integrations.

title: Incremental static regeneration for any framework
description: Library that adds ISR capabilities to any web framework. Pages are statically generated but can be individually revalidated without full rebuilds.

title: Open-source observability platform
description: Unified logs, metrics, and traces platform that's self-hostable. Compatible with OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, and Grafana. Uses ClickHouse for storage.

title: Voice-controlled home automation hub
description: Local-only voice assistant that controls smart home devices. All speech recognition runs on-device — no cloud dependency. Supports custom wake words and routines.

title: Type-safe API layer generator from database schema
description: Introspects your PostgreSQL schema and generates a fully typed REST and GraphQL API with validation, pagination, and access control. Zero boilerplate.

title: Decentralized file storage with erasure coding
description: Store files across a peer-to-peer network with redundancy via erasure coding. Files survive even if 30% of nodes go offline. Pay storage providers with crypto.

title: Interactive SQL learning platform
description: Browser-based SQL playground with progressive challenges. Each exercise runs against a real database with instant feedback and visual query execution plans.

title: Automated accessibility testing for web apps
description: CI/CD integration that crawls your web app and reports WCAG violations. Includes visual regression testing for color contrast and font size requirements.

title: Feature flag service with gradual rollouts
description: Self-hosted feature flag platform supporting percentage rollouts, A/B testing, and targeting rules. SDKs for all major languages with sub-millisecond evaluation.

title: End-to-end encrypted note-taking app
description: Markdown notes with E2EE. Sync across devices via encrypted blobs in S3. Supports backlinks, graph view, and full-text search — all client-side.

title: Container-native CI/CD with caching layers
description: A CI system where every step runs in a container with content-addressed caching. Unchanged steps are skipped entirely, making builds 10x faster on average.
